title: tragacantha polyphylla
intro: Tragacantha polyphylla, also known as the milk thistle plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Its seeds have been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include hepatoprotective and antioxidant effects. The plant's active compound, silymarin, has been shown to provide various health benefits, such as liver protection, anti-inflammatory effects, and improved digestion. Tragacantha polyphylla is often prepared as a herbal supplement, available in capsules, tablets, or tea form, and is commonly used to support liver health and overall well-being.
